footer.tagline: {name} — run your whole business from one place.
footer.whyReceiving: You are receiving this email because you have an account at {name}.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Creative Digital Accounting
welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.preheader: Your account has been created successfully.
welcome.intro: We’re glad you joined. Your account is ready and you can now manage invoices, documents, clients, inventory and finances from one place.
welcome.introVerify: For full access, please confirm your email address using the button below:
welcome.introStart: Log in to your dashboard to get started.
welcome.footnote: If you didn’t create this account, you can ignore this email.

verify.subject: Confirm your email address
verify.title: Confirm your email address
verify.intro2: Click the button below to confirm that this email address belongs to you. The link is valid for 24 hours.
verify.footnote: If you didn’t sign up, please ignore this email.

reset.subject: Password reset
reset.title: Forgot password
reset.intro2: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password. The link is valid for 60 minutes.
reset.footnote: If you didn’t request a password reset, ignore this email — your password stays unchanged.

changed.subject: Your password was changed
changed.title: Your password was changed successfully
changed.intro2: This is a confirmation that your account password has been changed.
changed.footnote: If you didn’t make this change, contact us immediately at office@creativedigitalaccounting.com.

locked.subject: Your account was temporarily locked
locked.title: Failed sign-in attempts detected
locked.intro2: We detected several consecutive failed sign-in attempts. To protect you, the account has been temporarily locked for 15 minutes. If this was you — please wait or reset your password.
locked.footnote: If this wasn't you, we recommend changing your password immediately.

newLogin.subject: New sign-in to your account
newLogin.title: New sign-in to your account
newLogin.intro2: We registered a sign-in to your account from a new device or location:
newLogin.footnote: If this was you, no action is needed. Otherwise, change your password immediately.

subSelected.subject: Your „{plan}“ subscription request was received
subSelected.title: We received your request
subSelected.intro2: We registered a request for the {plan} plan for {company}. To activate the subscription, please make a bank transfer using the following details:
subSelected.footnote: Once we receive the payment, we'll activate your subscription and send you a confirmation by email.

paymentSuccess.subject: Payment successful — thank you!
paymentSuccess.title: Payment received
paymentSuccess.intro: Thank you! The payment for {company}'s subscription has been confirmed and your plan is active.

paymentFailed.subject: Payment was not successful
paymentFailed.title: There was a problem with the payment
paymentFailed.intro: The payment attempt for the subscription ({plan}) for {company} was not successful. Please try again or choose another payment method.

subActivated.subject: The „{plan}“ subscription is activated
subActivated.title: Your subscription is active
subActivated.intro: The {plan} plan for {company} is now active. Thank you for being with us!

subRenewed.subject: Your subscription has been renewed
subRenewed.title: Thank you for renewing
subRenewed.intro: The {plan} plan for {company} has been renewed successfully.

planChanged.subjectUp: You upgraded to a higher plan
planChanged.intro: The plan for {company} was changed from {from} to {to}.

subExpiring.subject: Your subscription expires in {days} {daysWord}
subExpiring.title: Your subscription expires soon
subExpiring.intro1: This is a reminder that the {plan} plan for {company} expires on {until} (in {days} {daysWord}).
subExpiring.intro2: Renew in time to keep access to all features without interruption.
subExpiring.footnote: If you have already renewed your subscription, we apologize for the inconvenience and ask you to disregard this reminder.

subExpired.subject: Your subscription has expired
subExpired.title: Your subscription has expired
subExpired.intro1: The {plan} plan for {company} has expired and the account was reverted to the Free plan. Your data is preserved.
subExpired.intro2: Renew at any time to restore full access.
subExpired.footnote: If you have already renewed your subscription, we apologize and ask you to disregard this message.

unpaidInvoice.subject: Unpaid invoice No. {number}
unpaidInvoice.title: Invoice No. {number} is still unpaid
unpaidInvoice.intro: A reminder that invoice No. {number} ({amount}) for {company} is {days} {daysWord} past due.
unpaidInvoice.footnote: If the payment has already been made, please disregard this reminder.

expiringEntity.subject: {label} expires soon: {name}
expiringEntity.title: {label} expires on {date}
expiringEntity.intro: {label} „{name}“ is approaching its deadline ({date}). Please review it in time.

docCopy.subject: Copy: {label} No. {number}
docCopy.title: {label} No. {number}
docCopy.intro: Please find a copy of the document issued by {company}. You can view and download it from the link below.

toClient.subject: {company} sent you {docLabelLower} No. {number}
toClient.intro2: You can review it, download it as a PDF, and accept or reject it online:
toClient.footnote: The button opens a secure page just for you — no registration required.
